## What Changed

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Motivation and context. If this relates to Pi behavior, link to docs or source.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (corrects template drift or error)
- [ ] Parity update (aligns with upstream Pi changes)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] New feature (adds something new to the template)

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are backed by real Pi docs/examples/source (not aspirational)
- [ ] No rules duplicated across `.pi/SYSTEM.md` and `AGENTS.md` without justification
- [ ] README updated if the change affects user-facing behavior
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits (`fix:`, `docs:`, `feat:`, `chore:`)
